reading.title: Reading: My childhood neighbourhood
reading.passage: When I was a child, I was very shy and I wasn't interested in sports. My best friend and I were in the same class for years, and we were never bored in the summer. My parents weren't strict, as long as I was home before dinner.

questions.question: The writer was interested in sports as a child.
The writer's parents were very strict.

reading.title: Reading: A trip to Hoi An
reading.passage: Last summer, I visited Hoi An with my family. We booked a small hotel near the old town and stayed for four days. We explored the old streets every evening and discovered a wonderful little restaurant. We returned there twice.

questions.question: The family stayed for four days.
